svg.text: If responds → pause → AM call task

g.text: WF-Long-Term-Quarterly — fed by Cold + Nurture monthly

svg.text: SMS + Email same day, every 90 days — Q1–Q4 × 2 years, then stops
LTQ- template refs (shared across Cold + Nurture)
"Email only" contacts skip all SMS steps
Qualify → AM works directly (no WF) | No action in 7 days → drip resumes
Kill all drips → tag "re-submitted" → WF-New-Lead-Entry → full restart
